steps.title: Identify the shared habitat preference
steps.content: The passage identifies one habitat feature attracting both glossy ibises and little blue herons: areas with standing water for more than 60 days per year.

steps.title: Match this finding to the conclusion
steps.content: Choice D says standing water for far fewer than 60 days per year. This directly inverts what both species prefer, identifying exactly where neither is drawn. A focuses only on a single-species preference, B vaguely references the other species without data support, and C confuses the metric with breeding season length. That matches choice D — D is correct.
